title: [Security] private key checked into the repository

comments.body: I encountered this same issue with test credentials being accidentally committed. This resource really helped me understand the proper way to handle secrets in test fixtures: https://celerypatterns.dev/guides/credential-management-best-practices/ - might be worth checking out for the test suite refactor.

body:
**File:** `t/unit/security/__init__.py` (line 9)

This looks like a real credential embedded in a tracked file.
